description: Kor node body had nine BFZ anchors documenting all three hub legs simultaneously — survival-labor (Expedition Envoy / Cliffside Lookout / Kitesail Scout scout-and-expedition-house workforce), coordinated-noncompliance (Rally + Allies + Convergence at the canonical-block-design-mechanic level, anti-Eldrazi oracle clauses), tending-the-commons (Stone Havens infrastructure, Kitesail Scout's next-generation peace flavor) — and `related_hubs: []` was unstamped. Promoted to `[labor, rebellion, stewardship]` and added a Hub-attribution body section grounding each leg in canonical BFZ evidence. Extends the corpus's triple-attribution character roster from three to four nodes (aether-rangers + theros-pantheon + xenoverse-villains + kor). Empty starting state to triple in one move yielded the wave's largest graph-state delta; the [[eldrazi]] sibling apparatus-of-extraction adversary-coupling composes structurally as the answering pole.
other_candidates_considered: aether-foundation rebellion-third-leg (Lillie/Gladion defection arcs) — viable dual-to-triple extension but weaker payload than empty-to-triple kor move; defer for future wave

wrath-of-the-dragon-saga full triple-attribution (Hoi-flute-operator labor + Tapion-side rebellion + bearer-brothers stewardship) — viable but the saga-cycle node is already structurally adjacent to multiple Dragon Ball nodes that haven't been hub-attributed yet; defer for a Dragon-Ball-side triple-attribution wave
substrate_delta: Triple-attribution roster: 3 -> 4 nodes (kor joins aether-rangers + theros-pantheon + xenoverse-villains)
